title: matricaria inodora f. agrestis
intro: Matricaria inodora f. agrestis, also known as wild chamomile, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The health benefits of Matricaria inodora f. agrestis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and insomnia. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
